name: tlh_subtelomeric_helicase_family
description: tlh1 / tlh2 / tlh3 / tlh4 subtelomeric RecQ-family helicase paralog cluster in S. pombe. Each ~5 kb tlh ORF sits at the boundary of a non-rDNA subtelomere; tlh1 and tlh2 are >97% identical sister paralogs, tlh3/tlh4 are more diverged copies. Silenced by Clr4-mediated H3K9me; reactivation in clr4-delta or epe1-delta cells. Reads from tlh1 and tlh2 multi-map heavily.
